title: A family celebration
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last weekend, my family organised a celebration for my grandparents’ wedding anniversary. Relatives travelled from different parts of the country to spend the day together. My cousins arrived earlier (27) everyone else, so they helped decorate the garden before the guests came. We hung colourful lights between the trees and covered the tables (28) flowers from my grandmother’s garden. During the afternoon, my grandfather told stories about his childhood, and everyone listened carefully (29) him. Later, we ate a large meal outside because the weather was warm and sunny. I was surprised (30) how quickly the day passed because everyone was enjoying themselves so much. Before leaving, my grandparents thanked everyone (31) coming and said it had been one of the happiest days of their lives. I think family celebrations are important because they bring people closer (32) together.
